title: Stiperstones National Nature Reserve: change to name and site area
body: "Stiperstones NNR in Shropshire has increased in size and in future will be known as Stiperstones Landscape NNR.  This reserve is part of the King’s Series of National Nature Reserves which marks the coronation of His Majesty King Charles III.  The reserve will be managed by:   Natural England Forestry England Linley Estate Middle Marches Community Land Trust Shropshire Council Shropshire Wildlife Trust   See the maps attached to this page for the areas of land affected.  "
